title: Neverness to Everness vs Genshin Impact: 完整对比
titleEn: Neverness to Everness vs Genshin Impact: Complete Comparison
summary: 从战斗系统、开放世界探索、抽卡机制、画面表现等全方位对比异环与原神，帮你决定该不该入坑。
summaryEn: A comprehensive comparison of Neverness to Everness and Genshin Impact covering combat, exploration, gacha, graphics, and more.
content:
异环（Neverness to Everness）和原神（Genshin Impact）都是开放世界动作RPG，但两者在设计理念和玩法体验上有显著区别。

战斗系统对比

原神采用元素反应为核心的战斗机制，玩家通过切换4名角色触发元素反应来造成伤害。这个系统经过多年优化已经非常成熟，元素之间的搭配策略丰富。

异环的战斗系统更侧重于动作连招和异能系统。每个角色拥有独特的异能战斗方式，战斗节奏更快，更强调操作技巧。游戏引入了弹反机制和连携攻击，让战斗更具动作游戏的爽快感。

开放世界探索

原神的提瓦特大陆已经扩展到多个国家，地图面积庞大，内容丰富。探索以解谜、宝箱收集和世界任务为主。

异环的海特洛城是一个现代都市风格的开放世界，这在同类游戏中非常独特。探索元素包括城市探索、异象副本和收集品系统。现代都市的设定让游戏的探索体验与传统的奇幻开放世界截然不同。

抽卡系统

两款游戏都采用免费+抽卡的商业模式。原神的抽卡系统已经非常完善，有保底机制和武器池。异环的抽卡系统也在测试阶段，预计会提供类似的保底机制。

画面表现

原神采用卡通渲染风格，画面清新亮丽，对硬件要求相对友好。异环的画面更偏向写实风格，光影效果和材质渲染更为精细，对硬件配置要求更高。

平台支持

原神支持PC、手机、PlayStation多平台，且支持跨平台存档。异环目前以PC为主要平台，后续可能扩展到其他平台。

社交系统

原神以单机体验为主，支持有限的合作联机。异环预计会提供更多社交功能，包括组队挑战和社交互动。

适合人群

如果你喜欢元素反应策略、轻松的开放世界探索和卡通风格，原神是更好的选择。如果你更追求动作战斗的爽快感、现代都市世界观和高品质画面，异环值得一试。

两款游戏各有特色，不必非此即彼。作为异环 Wiki 站，我们认为异环在现代都市题材和动作战斗方面有独特优势，值得关注。

音乐与音效

原神的音乐由伦敦爱乐乐团等顶级乐团演奏，每个地区都有独特的音乐风格，是业界标杆。异环的音乐风格预计会偏向现代电子和都市氛围，与游戏的世界观保持一致。

更新频率

原神保持6周一次版本更新的节奏，每个版本都有新角色和新活动。异环作为新游戏，更新节奏还有待观察，但从测试阶段来看，内容储备充足。

新手友好度

原神的新手引导非常完善，游戏前期难度适中，适合各类玩家。异环的新手体验在测试中也在不断优化，预计正式上线时会提供良好的入门引导。

总评：两款游戏都是优秀的开放世界RPG，选择取决于你更偏爱奇幻还是都市、策略还是动作。作为异环Wiki，我们推荐同时体验两款游戏，它们各有所长。

更多关于异环角色的详细配装推荐和技能分析，请访问我们的角色详情页面。如果你还在犹豫是否入坑异环，可以先试试我们的抽卡模拟器，提前规划你的抽卡策略。我们也会持续更新异环的最新资讯和版本动态，确保你不会错过任何重要信息。如果你对异环的世界观感兴趣，也可以浏览我们的世界观百科页面。如果你想了解异环中哪个角色最值得培养，可以查看我们的强度排行榜页面，里面有全角色的详细评级和培养建议。

## 4.18前瞻直播确认：抽卡系统重大差异

**（以下内容已由官方前瞻直播确认，是异环与原神最大的差异化亮点）**

### 无50/50机制（最大区别）

异环已在官方前瞻直播中确认：**限定池没有50/50机制**。当你在限定卡池抽到S级角色时，100%是当期UP角色。这意味着异环的限定池保底只需最多90抽即可确保获得心仪角色。

相比之下，原神的限定角色池存在50/50机制：首次抽出5星时有50%概率是当期UP角色，如果"歪了"（抽到常驻角色），需要最多180抽才能通过大保底获得当期UP角色。这个机制是原神玩家最大的痛点之一，而异环从根本上解决了这个问题。

### 新手池自选

异环提供新手限定池，20抽保底必出S级角色，且可以从指定的S级角色中自选。原神没有任何类似的新手自选机制。

### 常驻池自选

异环的常驻池在累计50抽后会赠送一张S级角色自选券，玩家可以从常驻S级角色中任选一个。原神的常驻池（奔行世间）没有任何自选机制，抽到什么全靠运气。

### 城市经营送S级角色

异环的城市经营（City Tycoon）玩法会赠送免费S级角色「小吱」。原神只会赠送免费4星角色（如芭芭拉、香菱等），从未赠送过免费5星角色。

### 开服约418抽福利

异环开服预计赠送约418抽的免费资源，远超原神同期的开服福利。这对于零氪和微氪玩家来说是非常友好的起步条件。

### 4个卡池体系

异环拥有4个独立的卡池：限定角色池、新手池、常驻池和武器池。原神只有3个卡池：角色活动祈愿（限定）、常驻祈愿和武器祈愿。异环多出的新手池为新手玩家提供了更好的起步体验。

**总结**：从抽卡系统来看，异环在玩家友好度上全面超越原神。无50/50机制意味着你的每一抽都更有价值，新手池自选和常驻池自选大幅降低了获取心仪角色的门槛，加上开服418抽的丰厚福利，异环对零氪和微氪玩家来说是目前市面上最友好的抽卡游戏之一。
contentEn:
Neverness to Everness (NTE) and Genshin Impact are both open-world action RPGs, but they differ significantly in design philosophy and gameplay experience.

Combat System

Genshin Impact features an elemental reaction-based combat system where players switch between 4 characters to trigger elemental combinations. This system has been refined over years and offers rich strategic depth.

NTE focuses more on action combos and the Esper ability system. Each character has unique Esper combat styles with faster-paced gameplay that emphasizes player skill. The game introduces parry mechanics and combo attacks for a more action-oriented feel.

Open World Exploration

Genshin Impact's Teyvat has expanded across multiple nations with massive maps and rich content. Exploration centers around puzzles, treasure chests, and world quests.

NTE's Hethereau is a modern urban open world, which is unique among similar games. Exploration includes city discovery, Anomaly Dungeons, and collectible systems. The modern city setting creates an entirely different exploration experience compared to traditional fantasy open worlds.

Gacha System

Both games use a free-to-play gacha model. Genshin has a well-established system with pity mechanics and weapon banners. NTE's gacha system is being refined during testing with similar pity guarantees expected.

Graphics

Genshin uses cel-shaded rendering with bright, colorful visuals and relatively modest hardware requirements. NTE leans toward realistic rendering with more detailed lighting and material effects, requiring higher-end hardware.

Platform Support

Genshin supports PC, mobile, and PlayStation with cross-platform saves. NTE primarily targets PC with potential expansion to other platforms.

Social Features

Genshin is primarily single-player with limited co-op. NTE is expected to offer more social features including team challenges and social interactions.

Who Should Play What

If you enjoy elemental reaction strategy, relaxed open-world exploration, and anime aesthetics, Genshin is the better choice. If you prefer action combat intensity, modern urban worldbuilding, and high-fidelity graphics, NTE is worth trying.

Both games have their strengths. As an NTE wiki, we believe NTE's modern urban theme and action combat offer unique advantages worth exploring. For more details on NTE's characters and builds, check our character guides and tier list.

## Livestream Confirmed: Major Gacha System Differences

**(The following has been confirmed via official livestream and represents the single biggest differentiator for NTE)**

### No 50/50 System (BIGGEST DIFFERENCE)

NTE has confirmed via its official livestream that there is **NO 50/50 mechanic on the limited banner**. When you pull an S-rank character on the limited banner, it is 100% guaranteed to be the featured character. This means NTE's limited banner pity requires at most 90 pulls to guarantee your desired character.

In contrast, Genshin Impact's limited character banner has a 50/50 mechanic: when you pull a 5-star for the first time, there is only a 50% chance it is the featured character. If you "lose" the 50/50 (get a standard banner character), you need up to 180 pulls total to guarantee the featured character through the hard pity system. This mechanic has been one of the biggest pain points for Genshin players, and NTE eliminates it entirely.

### Beginner Banner Selector

NTE offers a beginner-exclusive banner where 20 pulls guarantees an S-rank character, and you can SELECT which S-rank you want from a specific pool. Genshin has no equivalent beginner selector mechanic.

### Standard Banner Selector

At 50 pulls on NTE's standard banner, you receive an S-rank selector ticket that lets you choose any S-rank from the standard pool. Genshin's standard banner (Wanderlust Invocation) has no selector mechanic whatsoever — you get whatever the RNG gives you.

### Free S-Rank from City Tycoon

NTE gives players a free S-rank character (Xiaozhi) through the City Tycoon game mode. Genshin only gives away free 4-star characters (such as Barbara, Xiangling, etc.) and has never given away a free 5-star character.

### ~418 Free Pulls at Launch

NTE is giving approximately 418 free pulls at launch, far exceeding Genshin Impact's launch rewards. This is an extremely generous starting condition for free-to-play and low-spending players.

### 4 Gacha Pools

NTE has 4 distinct gacha pools: Limited Character Banner, Beginner Banner, Standard Banner, and Weapon Banner. Genshin has 3: Character Event Wish (limited), Standard Wish, and Weapon Wish. NTE's additional Beginner Banner provides new players with a much better on-ramp experience.

**Bottom Line**: When it comes to the gacha system, NTE is significantly more player-friendly than Genshin Impact in every measurable way. The absence of a 50/50 mechanic means every pull holds more value, the beginner and standard banner selectors dramatically lower the barrier to obtaining desired characters, and the ~418 free pulls at launch make NTE one of the most generous gacha games on the market for free-to-play and low-spending players.

title: 异环 vs 鸣潮：动作RPG全面对比
titleEn: Neverness to Everness vs Wuthering Waves: Action RPG Showdown
summary: 异环和鸣潮同为动作RPG新锐，从战斗深度、世界观设定、养成系统等角度全面对比。
summaryEn: A detailed comparison of NTE and Wuthering Waves covering combat depth, worldbuilding, progression, and more.
content:
异环和鸣潮（Wuthering Waves）都是近两年最受期待的动作RPG手游，两款游戏在战斗设计和世界观上有不少相似之处，但核心体验截然不同。

战斗系统深度对比

鸣潮的战斗系统以声骸（Echo）为核心，玩家可以吸收怪物的声骸并使用其技能。战斗强调闪避、弹反和共鸣链，操作上限很高。

异环的战斗围绕异能者（Espers）的能力展开，每个角色拥有独特的异能战斗方式。游戏同样提供弹反和连携攻击，但整体节奏更快，更偏向纯动作体验。异环的技能设计更注重角色个体的差异化和操作反馈。

世界观与叙事

鸣潮构建了一个后末日科幻世界——索拉里斯，以声骸和悲鸣为核心设定。故事氛围偏沉重，世界观复杂。

异环则选择了现代都市奇幻路线。海特洛城是一个充满超自然现象的现代城市，异能者们在城市中执行委托、对抗异象。这种设定在同类游戏中非常少见，对喜欢都市题材的玩家有独特吸引力。

养成系统

鸣潮的养成包括角色升级、武器强化和声骸系统。声骸的随机性较强，养成周期长。

异环的养成系统包含角色升级、武器培养和磁盘（Disk）套装系统。磁盘系统类似于圣遗物/声骸，提供随机副词条。异环还引入了角色专属的异能成长路线。

抽卡与商业模式

两款游戏都采用免费+抽卡模式。鸣潮的保底机制与原神类似，90抽大保底。异环的抽卡系统尚在测试中，预计会有竞争力的保底设计。

画面与技术

鸣潮使用虚幻引擎，画面精美但优化问题较多。异环的自研引擎在画面表现上不逊色，特别是在城市建筑和光影效果方面有优势。

推荐选择

如果你喜欢硬核动作操作和声骸收集玩法，鸣潮更适合你。如果你更偏爱现代都市奇幻设定和快节奏战斗，异环会让你满意。两款游戏都值得尝试，作为动作RPG爱好者完全可以双修。

更多异环的角色攻略和配装推荐，请访问我们的角色页面和配队指南。

新手入门体验

鸣潮在上线初期面临了不少优化和体验问题，经过多个版本更新后才逐步改善。异环从测试阶段就非常重视玩家反馈，预计正式上线时会有更完善的新手体验。

音乐与氛围

鸣潮的音乐风格偏向史诗和科幻，与游戏的后末日世界观契合。异环的音乐预计会融入更多现代都市元素和电子乐风格，营造独特的城市氛围。

社区与生态

鸣潮已经建立了相对成熟的玩家社区和内容生态。异环作为新游戏，社区正在快速成长中。早期加入一个新游戏的社区往往能获得更多参与感和归属感。

总评：鸣潮在声骸收集和硬核动作方面有独到之处，异环则在都市奇幻和战斗爽快感上更具特色。两款游戏各有千秋，值得一试。

想了解更多异环角色的详细配装和配队推荐，欢迎访问我们的角色数据库和配队指南。我们的升级计算器也可以帮你规划角色养成路线。我们也提供异环的世界观百科和地点图鉴，帮助你更深入地了解海特洛城的每一个角落。对于新手玩家，我们的FAQ页面收集了最常见的问题和解答。如果你关心异环和鸣潮的角色强度对比，我们的强度排行榜和配队指南可以提供详细的参考数据和实战分析。
contentEn:
Neverness to Everness (NTE) and Wuthering Waves (WuWa) are two of the most anticipated action RPGs, sharing similarities in combat design but offering distinctly different core experiences.

Combat Depth

WuWa's combat centers around the Echo system, where players absorb monster abilities. Combat emphasizes dodge counters, parries, and resonance chains with a high skill ceiling.

NTE focuses on Esper abilities, with each character wielding unique powers. The game also features parries and combo attacks but with faster pacing and a more pure action feel. NTE's skill design emphasizes individual character identity and responsive feedback.

Worldbuilding & Narrative

WuWa builds a post-apocalyptic sci-fi world — Solaris — centered on Echoes and the Lament. The tone is serious with complex lore.

NTE takes a modern urban fantasy approach. Hethereau is a modern city filled with supernatural phenomena where Espers take on commissions and fight Anomalies. This setting is rare in the genre and uniquely appealing to fans of urban fantasy themes.

Progression Systems

WuWa features character leveling, weapon enhancement, and the Echo system. Echoes have significant RNG, leading to long grinding periods.

NTE includes character leveling, weapon upgrades, and the Disk set system. Disks function similarly to artifacts/echoes with random sub-stats. NTE also introduces character-specific Esper growth paths.

Gacha & Business Model

Both games use free-to-play gacha models. WuWa follows a 90-pull pity system similar to Genshin. NTE's gacha system is still being tested with competitive pity mechanics expected.

Graphics & Technology

WuWa uses Unreal Engine with stunning visuals but has faced optimization issues. NTE's custom engine matches the visual quality, particularly excelling in city architecture and lighting effects.

Recommendation

If you enjoy hardcore action mechanics and Echo collecting, WuWa is your game. If you prefer modern urban fantasy settings with fast-paced combat, NTE will satisfy you. Both are worth playing for action RPG fans.

For more NTE character guides and build recommendations, visit our character pages and team building guide.

title: 10 款类似异环的游戏推荐
titleEn: 10 Best Games Like Neverness to Everness
summary: 如果你喜欢异环的现代都市奇幻风格和动作战斗，这10款游戏同样值得尝试。
summaryEn: If you enjoy NTE's modern urban fantasy and action combat, these 10 games are worth trying.
content:
如果你正在等待异环正式上线，或者想在体验异环的同时尝试类似风格的游戏，以下10款游戏值得你关注。

1. 原神（Genshin Impact）
开放世界动作RPG的标杆之作。虽然世界观是奇幻风格而非都市题材，但元素反应战斗和丰富的探索内容使其成为同类游戏中的佼佼者。免费游玩，支持多平台。

2. 鸣潮（Wuthering Waves）
与异环最直接的竞品。同样主打高难度动作战斗，声骸系统提供了独特的养成路线。后末日科幻世界观设定，画面精美。

3. 崩坏：星穹铁道（Honkai: Star Rail）
虽然采用回合制而非动作战斗，但同样是米哈游出品的品质保证。科幻世界观和精良的角色设计使其成为2024-2025年最受欢迎的手游之一。

4. 绝区零（Zenless Zone Zero）
米哈游的都市动作游戏，以现代都市为背景，与异环的都市奇幻设定有相似之处。roguelike地牢探索和流畅的动作战斗是其核心卖点。

5. 幻塔（Tower of Fantasy）
开放世界RPG，融合了科幻和奇幻元素。与异环类似，有丰富的角色培养和联机内容。免费游玩。

6. 蔚蓝档案（Blue Archive）
校园题材的RPG，虽然是策略战斗而非动作，但现代校园世界观设定与异环的都市氛围有异曲同工之妙。

7. 漫威 Snap（Marvel Snap）
如果你喜欢收集和策略，这款快节奏卡牌游戏是不错的选择。每局只需3分钟，适合碎片时间。

8. P5X（Persona 5: The Phantom X）
女神异闻录系列的手游版，同样是都市奇幻题材。日常校园生活和异世界冒险的双线叙事，与异环的都市异能设定有共鸣。

9. 战双帕弥什（Punishing: Gray Raven）
高品质动作RPG，以末日科幻为背景。战斗系统硬核流畅，角色设计精美。如果你喜欢异环的战斗节奏，战双同样会让你满意。

10. 鸣潮（逆向推荐）
最后再次推荐鸣潮，因为它是与异环玩法最接近的游戏。如果你还没尝试过，强烈建议体验。

以上游戏中，绝区零和P5X在都市题材上与异环最为接近。鸣潮和原神则在开放世界探索方面提供了类似但不同的体验。

更多异环相关的游戏资讯和攻略，请关注我们的攻略指南和角色页面。

如何选择适合你的游戏

选择游戏时建议从以下几个维度考虑：如果你最看重开放世界探索的广度，原神是首选；如果你追求硬核动作操作的上限，鸣潮更合适；如果你偏爱都市题材和现代美学，绝区零和P5X最接近异环的风格。

平台和时间投入

大部分推荐游戏都支持移动端，适合碎片时间游玩。但如果你追求最佳画面和操作体验，PC端是更好的选择。每款游戏的日常任务时间在15-30分钟不等。

氪金建议

所有推荐游戏都可以免费游玩核心内容。建议先体验每款游戏的前几小时，找到最适合自己的再考虑投入。月卡通常是性价比最高的付费选项。

更多关于异环的最新信息和攻略，请持续关注我们的攻略指南和角色数据库。

以上推荐覆盖了动作RPG、都市奇幻和开放世界探索等多种类型。无论你最终选择哪款游戏，我们的异环Wiki都会持续提供最新最全的游戏攻略和工具支持。如果你想对比异环和其他热门游戏，可以阅读我们的异环 vs 原神对比和异环 vs 鸣潮对比文章，获取更详细的横向评测。
contentEn:
If you're waiting for NTE's official launch or want to try similar games alongside it, here are 10 games worth your attention.

1. Genshin Impact
The benchmark for open-world action RPGs. While its world is fantasy rather than urban, the elemental reaction combat and rich exploration make it the genre leader. Free-to-play with multi-platform support.

2. Wuthering Waves
NTE's most direct competitor. Also focused on skill-based action combat with the unique Echo system providing distinct progression. Post-apocalyptic sci-fi setting with stunning visuals.

3. Honkai: Star Rail
While turn-based rather than action, this HoYoverse title delivers quality assurance. Sci-fi worldbuilding and polished character design make it one of the most popular mobile games.

4. Zenless Zone Zero
HoYoverse's urban action game set in a modern city, sharing NTE's urban fantasy DNA. Roguelike dungeon exploration and fluid action combat are its core selling points.

5. Tower of Fantasy
Open-world RPG blending sci-fi and fantasy elements. Like NTE, it offers rich character progression and multiplayer content. Free-to-play.

6. Blue Archive
School-themed RPG with modern campus worldbuilding. While strategy-based rather than action, its contemporary setting resonates with NTE's urban atmosphere.

7. Persona 5: The Phantom X
The mobile adaptation of the Persona series shares NTE's urban fantasy theme. The dual narrative of daily school life and otherworldly adventure parallels NTE's Esper system.

8. Punishing: Gray Raven
High-quality action RPG in a post-apocalyptic sci-fi setting. Hardcore fluid combat and beautiful character designs. If you enjoy NTE's combat pacing, PGR will satisfy.

9. Wuthering Waves (Revisited)
Recommended again as the closest gameplay experience to NTE. If you haven't tried it yet, it's highly recommended.

10. Tower of Fantasy (Alternative Pick)
For those seeking open-world exploration with character collection, ToF provides a different but related experience.

Among these, Zenless Zone Zero and P5X share the closest urban themes with NTE. Wuthering Waves and Genshin offer similar but distinct open-world exploration experiences.

For more NTE guides, character builds, and game updates, check our guides section and character pages.

title: 异环 vs 绝区零：都市动作RPG终极对比
titleEn: Neverness to Everness vs Zenless Zone Zero: Urban Action RPG Showdown
summary: 从战斗系统、开放世界、抽卡机制（无50/50）、画面风格等维度全面对比异环与绝区零，帮你选择最适合的都市动作RPG。
summaryEn: A comprehensive comparison of NTE and Zenless Zone Zero covering combat, open world vs instanced, gacha (no 50/50), graphics, and more.
content:
异环（Neverness to Everness）和绝区零（Zenless Zone Zero）都是以现代都市为背景的动作RPG，但两款游戏在设计理念、探索模式和抽卡机制上有根本性的差异。本文将从多个维度进行全面对比。

## 战斗系统对比

绝区零的战斗以动作连携和属性异常为核心。玩家操控小队成员进行高速动作战斗，通过触发属性异常（电击、冰冻、灼烧等）积累失衡值，最终释放华丽的连携技终结敌人。战斗节奏明快，角色切换流畅，打击感优秀。

异环的战斗则围绕异能者（Esper）系统展开。每个角色拥有独特的异能战斗方式，强调连招组合和弹反机制。战斗整体节奏同样快，但更注重个体操作技巧和异能技能的差异化设计。弹反成功后的反击体验非常爽快，给硬核动作玩家带来满足感。

总体而言，绝区零的战斗更偏向团队协作和属性策略，异环则更强调单人操作上限和角色个体差异。

## 世界观与探索模式

这是两款游戏最大的区别之一。

绝区零的世界观设定在新艾利都，一个遭受空洞危机的都市。玩家通过HDD系统进入空洞进行探索。游戏采用关卡制设计，玩家在TV频道的格子地图上移动探索，遇到敌人时切换到3D战斗场景。这种TV探索+战斗的混合模式是绝区零的核心特色。

异环则构建了一个真正的开放都市世界——海特洛城。玩家可以无缝探索这座充满超自然现象的现代城市，没有加载画面，没有关卡分隔。你可以在街道上自由行走、驾驶载具穿越城市、进入各种建筑。异象副本和世界事件散布在城市各处，等待玩家发现。

简而言之：绝区零是关卡制都市探索，异环是开放世界都市探索。如果你喜欢自由度更高的探索体验，异环更合适；如果你喜欢精心设计的关卡节奏，绝区零的体验更为紧凑。

## 抽卡机制差异（核心区别）

这是异环比绝区零最显著的玩家友好优势。

### 无50/50机制

异环已在官方前瞻直播中确认：**限定池没有50/50机制**。当你在限定卡池抽到S级角色时，100%是当期UP角色。最多90抽即可确保获得心仪角色。

绝区零采用传统的50/50机制：首次抽出S级角色时有50%概率歪到常驻角色。如果歪了，需要最多180抽（大保底）才能确保获得当期UP角色。这意味着同样追求一个限定角色，异环最多只需90抽，绝区零可能需要180抽——差了一倍。

### 新手福利对比

异环提供新手限定池，20抽保底必出S级角色且可自选。常驻池累计50抽赠送S级自选券。城市经营玩法赠送免费S级角色「小吱」。开服预计赠送约418抽免费资源。

绝区零的新手池提供20抽8折优惠，但无自选机制。开服福利约300抽左右，且所有限定池都有50/50风险。

### 总结

从抽卡系统来看，异环对零氪和微氪玩家友好得多。无50/50意味着每一抽的价值都更高，加上更丰厚的新手福利，异环是目前市面上对免费玩家最慷慨的都市动作RPG之一。

## 画面与美术风格

绝区零采用风格化的赛璐璐渲染，美术风格强烈且独特。角色设计偏向潮流感十足的风格化动漫，色彩鲜明，视觉冲击力强。画面整体精致统一，且对硬件要求相对友好。

异环使用虚幻引擎5（UE5）打造写实渲染风格。城市建筑的光影效果、材质细节和氛围渲染都非常精细，追求更真实的视觉体验。这也意味着异环对硬件配置要求更高，尤其是在PC端。

两款游戏的美术方向完全不同：绝区零是风格化的潮流美学，异环是写实的都市质感。各有千秋，取决于个人审美偏好。

## 平台支持

异环和绝区零都支持PC、手机和PS5平台。不过绝区零已经上线较久，各平台优化成熟。异环作为新游戏，移动端的优化表现还有待上线后验证。

## 特色系统

### 异环：载具驾驶与买房装修

异环提供了同类游戏中少见的载具系统。玩家可以在城市中驾驶各种车辆自由穿行，大幅提升探索效率。此外，异环还有买房和房屋装修系统，玩家可以自定义自己的居住空间，这在动作RPG中是非常独特的体验。

### 绝区零：TV探索与连携技

绝区零的核心特色是TV频道探索系统。玩家以TV遥控器般的操作在格子地图上探索，触发事件、收集资源和战斗。战斗中的连携技系统也是一大亮点，角色之间的切换连携动画华丽流畅。

## 内容类型

异环作为开放世界游戏，内容类型更加多样化：主线任务、支线委托、异象副本、城市经营、载具挑战、房屋装修、世界事件等。探索自由度高，玩家可以按自己的节奏体验内容。

绝区零的内容以关卡为单位：主线章节、零号空洞（roguelike）、式舆防卫战（深渊）、日常委托和限时活动。内容密度高，每段体验都经过精心设计，但自由度相对受限。

## 音乐与联动

绝区零的音乐融合了电子、摇滚和都市流行风格，与游戏的潮流美学高度契合。同时绝区零已有多次品牌联动（如Fairy、各种快闪活动），IP运营成熟。

异环的音乐预计会偏向都市氛围和电子乐风格。作为新游戏，联动活动尚在规划中，但完美世界在国内市场的IP运营经验丰富，未来可期。

## 商业模式总结

两款游戏都采用免费游玩+内购抽卡的商业模式。但从玩家角度出发：

异环：无50/50、90抽保底必出UP、新手池自选、常驻池自选、开服418抽、免费S级角色。

绝区零：有50/50、大保底180抽、新手池8折、开服约300抽、无免费S级角色。

在抽卡友好度上，异环全面优于绝区零。

## 总结：该怎么选？

如果你喜欢：开放世界自由探索、驾驶载具、买房装修、写实画质、无50/50抽卡——选异环。

如果你喜欢：关卡制紧凑体验、TV格子探索、风格化美术、精良的连携战斗——选绝区零。

当然，两款游戏都是免费的，完全可以同时体验。用异环满足你的开放世界探索欲望，用绝区零享受关卡制的精良战斗体验。

更多异环角色的详细配装推荐和技能分析，请访问我们的角色详情页面。想了解异环哪个角色最值得培养，可以查看我们的强度排行榜。如果你对异环的抽卡系统感兴趣，试试我们的抽卡模拟器。如果你还想对比异环和原神，可以阅读我们的异环vs原神对比文章。
contentEn:
Neverness to Everness (NTE) and Zenless Zone Zero (ZZZ) are both urban-themed action RPGs, but they differ fundamentally in design philosophy, exploration model, and gacha mechanics. This article provides a comprehensive comparison across multiple dimensions.

## Combat System

ZZZ's combat centers on chain attacks and attribute anomalies. Players control a squad in high-speed action combat, building up daze through attribute disorders (Shock, Freeze, Burn, etc.) to trigger spectacular chain attacks. The combat rhythm is snappy, character swaps are fluid, and the impact feel is excellent.

NTE's combat revolves around the Esper ability system. Each character has unique Esper combat styles emphasizing combo chains and parry mechanics. The pacing is equally fast but focuses more on individual skill expression and the differentiated design of Esper abilities. Successfully landing parries triggers satisfying counter-attacks that reward hardcore action players.

Overall, ZZZ's combat leans toward team synergy and attribute strategy, while NTE emphasizes individual mechanical skill ceiling and character-specific playstyles.

## World & Exploration

This is one of the biggest differences between the two games.

ZZZ is set in New Eridu, a city plagued by the Hollow crisis. Players enter Hollows through the HDD system. The game uses an instance-based design where players explore on a TV-channel grid map, switching to 3D combat scenes when encountering enemies. This TV exploration + combat hybrid is ZZZ's signature gameplay loop.

NTE builds a true open-world urban environment — Hethereau. Players seamlessly explore this modern city filled with supernatural phenomena with no loading screens or instance boundaries. You can freely walk the streets, drive vehicles across the city, and enter various buildings. Anomaly dungeons and world events are scattered throughout the city waiting to be discovered.

In short: ZZZ offers instance-based urban exploration, while NTE provides open-world urban exploration. If you prefer higher exploration freedom, NTE is the better fit. If you enjoy carefully paced level design, ZZZ delivers a tighter experience.

## Gacha Differences (Key Differentiator)

This is NTE's most significant player-friendly advantage over ZZZ.

### No 50/50 System

NTE has confirmed via its official livestream that there is **NO 50/50 mechanic on the limited banner**. When you pull an S-rank character on the limited banner, it is 100% guaranteed to be the featured character. At most 90 pulls guarantees your desired character.

ZZZ uses the traditional 50/50 mechanic: when you pull an S-rank for the first time, there is a 50% chance you get a standard banner character instead. If you lose the 50/50, you need up to 180 pulls (hard pity) to guarantee the featured character. This means for the same featured character, NTE requires at most 90 pulls while ZZZ may require up to 180 — literally double the cost.

### Beginner Benefits Comparison

NTE offers a beginner-exclusive banner with 20-pull pity guaranteeing an S-rank character that you can SELECT. The standard banner grants an S-rank selector ticket at 50 cumulative pulls. The City Tycoon game mode gives a free S-rank character (Xiaozhi). Launch rewards total approximately 418 free pulls.

ZZZ's beginner banner offers a 20% discount on 20 pulls but has no selector mechanic. Launch rewards totaled roughly 300 pulls, and all limited banners carry 50/50 risk.

### Bottom Line

When it comes to the gacha system, NTE is significantly more F2P-friendly. No 50/50 means every pull holds more value, and the more generous beginner benefits make NTE one of the most generous urban action RPGs on the market for free-to-play players.

## Graphics & Art Style

ZZZ features stylized cel-shaded rendering with a strong, distinctive art direction. Character designs lean toward trendy, stylized anime with bold colors and high visual impact. The overall aesthetic is cohesive and polished, with relatively modest hardware requirements.

NTE uses Unreal Engine 5 (UE5) for realistic rendering. The city's lighting effects, material details, and atmospheric rendering are highly refined, pursuing a more authentic visual experience. This also means NTE has higher hardware requirements, especially on PC.

The two games have completely different art directions: ZZZ is stylized trendy aesthetics, while NTE is realistic urban texture. Both are excellent in their own right — it comes down to personal preference.

## Platform Support

Both NTE and ZZZ support PC, mobile, and PS5 platforms. However, ZZZ has been live longer and has mature optimization across all platforms. NTE, as a newer game, still needs to prove its mobile optimization at launch.

## Unique Features

### NTE: Vehicle Driving & Housing

NTE offers a vehicle system rarely seen in similar games. Players can drive various vehicles freely through the city, greatly improving exploration efficiency. Additionally, NTE features a home purchasing and interior decoration system where players can customize their living space — a very unique experience in the action RPG genre.

### ZZZ: TV Exploration & Chain Attacks

ZZZ's core feature is the TV channel exploration system. Players navigate grid-based maps with TV remote-like controls, triggering events, collecting resources, and entering combat. The chain attack system in combat is also a highlight, with flashy and fluid character swap animations.

## Content Types

As an open-world game, NTE offers more diverse content types: main story quests, side commissions, Anomaly dungeons, City Tycoon, vehicle challenges, housing decoration, world events, and more. Exploration freedom is high, and players can experience content at their own pace.

ZZZ's content is organized into instances: main story chapters, Hollow Zero (roguelike), Shiyu Defense (abyss), daily commissions, and limited-time events. Content density is high with each segment carefully designed, but freedom is relatively constrained.

## Music & Collaborations

ZZZ's music blends electronic, rock, and urban pop styles that perfectly complement its trendy aesthetics. ZZZ has also had multiple brand collaborations and pop-up events, with mature IP management.

NTE's music is expected to lean toward urban atmosphere and electronic styles. As a new game, collaboration events are still being planned, but Perfect World's extensive IP management experience in the Chinese market bodes well for the future.

## Monetization Summary

Both games use a free-to-play + gacha monetization model. From the player's perspective:

NTE: No 50/50, 90-pull pity guarantees the featured character, beginner banner selector, standard banner selector, ~418 free pulls at launch, free S-rank character.

ZZZ: Has 50/50, hard pity at 180 pulls, beginner banner discount, ~300 free pulls at launch, no free S-rank character.

On gacha generosity, NTE comprehensively outperforms ZZZ.

## Final Verdict: Which Should You Choose?

If you enjoy: open-world free exploration, driving vehicles, buying and decorating homes, realistic graphics, and no 50/50 gacha — choose NTE.

If you prefer: instance-based tightly designed experiences, TV grid exploration, stylized art, and polished chain-attack combat — choose ZZZ.

Of course, both games are free to play, so you can easily enjoy both. Use NTE to satisfy your open-world exploration cravings and ZZZ for refined instance-based combat sessions.

For more detailed NTE character builds and skill analysis, visit our character pages. To see which NTE characters are worth investing in, check our tier list. If you are interested in NTE's gacha system, try our gacha simulator. For a comparison between NTE and Genshin Impact, read our NTE vs Genshin article.
